Actions.Text: REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO WAYS AND MEANS

Votes.VoteType: Favorable refer to committee Ways and Means

Title: Authorizes the village of New Hyde Park to file an application for exemption from real property taxes
Summary: Authorizes the village of New Hyde Park to file an application for exemption from real property taxes for a portion of the 2024-2025 assessment rolls and all of the 2025 general taxes.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the village of New Hyde Park to file an application for exemption from real property taxes
